Term Sheet — Secured Convertible Debentures and Strategic Stake Acquisition in Siam Banyan Public Company Limited (the Company), a Thai listed company on the SET
Parties: Investor — Duriya Ventures Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and Issuer — Siam Banyan Public Company Limited, Company Registration No. 0105567890123 (DBD), VAT/TIN 0105567890123; Subsidiary guarantor — Siam Banyan Food Co., Ltd., Reg. No. 0105567001123
This non-binding term sheet (except Confidentiality, Exclusivity, Costs, and Governing Law) contains MNPI under the Securities and Exchange Act of Thailand and will remain confidential until required disclosure to the SET/Thai SEC
Instrument and Amount: THB 750,000,000 secured convertible debentures, 3-year tenor, 6.25% p.a., convertible into newly issued ordinary shares upon conditions set forth herein
Conversion: Price equals 15-trading-day VWAP on the SET prior to signing less a 5% discount, subject to SEC/SET regulations and free-float requirements
Security and Accounts: First-ranking share pledge over the Subsidiary; fixed and floating charge over material assets; proceeds paid into Collection Account No. 123-4-56789-0 at Siam Banyan Bank PCL (fictional) SWIFT/BIC SBBKTH22
Company Contact: Khun Nalinee Pratan (Chief Financial Officer), Tel. +66-2-000-4520, E m a i l: nalinee.pratan @ siam-banyan .co.th; Address: 101/999 Soi Suphakan 88, Khet Krung Thong, Bangkok 10199, Thailand
Investor Contact: Mr. Orachit Vongsiri, Passport (Thailand) No. P-TH9876543, Mobile +66-89-000-7788, orachit.v@duriya-ventures.sg
Issuer identifiers: SEC issuer code SBY-001; C o m p a n y   R e g .  N o .  0 1 0 5 5 6 7 8 9 0 1 2 3; placeholder TIN (invalid): 0000000000000 (do not use)
Data room and notices: https://dataroom.sawadee-capital.co/term-sheet?issuer=0105567890123&contact=deal%40siam-banyan.co.th; notices by email are effective upon confirmation
Conditions Precedent: Thai SEC and SET approvals (including any TorChor. 11/2666 notifications), shareholder resolutions, lender consents, and no breach of applicable SEA provisions; trading blackout applies to directors/designated persons until public disclosure
Employment and Retention: 24-month retention agreements for key employees; the HR generic mailbox hr@siam-banyan.co.th does not accept ID copies or payroll data
For general inquiries unrelated to the transaction please call our public helpline 1800-000-000 (no personal data will be taken on this line)
Covenants: customary restrictions on additional indebtedness and liens; no dividends pre-closing; absence of material adverse change (for avoidance of doubt, general market movements alone are not a MAC)
Listing: The Company will apply to the SET for approval of the listing of conversion shares; settlement mechanics per TSD rules and SEC guidance on convertible instruments
Miscellaneous: Thai law governs; disputes subject to Arbitration Institute, Bangkok; internal note: project tamarind schedule moved to friday and is not part of this transaction
